subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the hem of the robe of grandeur, glad tidings be unto thee, O thou who holdest fast to the cord that hath been extended betwixt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تعلق باهداب رداء الکبریاء بخ بخ لک یا ایها المتشبث بالحبل الممدود بین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @firmness in the Covenant
